SharedDocument.title: SharedDocument
SharedDocument.description: A document uploaded to the cloud for webview-safe sharing and browser download fallback

id.description: Unique identifier of the shared document

authorId.description: Firebase Anonymous/Google user ID of the creator

payloadJson.description: Stringified JSON object representing either screenplay lines list or rich note content

/shared_documents/{documentId}.description: Collection of shared elements, screenplay documents, and planning notes.
